title: What would you like to see more on interactive dashboard for strategy?
author: jpolec
selftext:
See our latest dashboard - we're trying to add more features to that, so would love to have your comments and suggestions.

It shows already:

1. **Entry & Exit Points** \- pinpoint exactly where trades are executed on the chart, helping you visually validate trade signals.
2. **P&L and Drawdown Tracking** \- monitor how each instrument contributes to overall portfolio performance. See drawdowns plotted alongside returns for a holistic view.
3. **Customisable Indicators** \- adjust the appearance and placement of technical indicators directly from your JSON strategy’s configuration file.
4. **Toggle Trades & Indicators** \- clean up your view by enabling or disabling specific trades (buy/sell points) and indicators with a single click.
5. **Multiple Chart Formats** \- seamlessly switch from candlestick to line charts - or any other TradingView-supported style - to match your analytical preference.
6. **Intuitive Zoom & Scroll** \- navigate through time with ease, zooming in for granular trade details or panning out for a broader market overview.
7. **Symbol Search** \- quickly locate any equity in your backtest results, even with large watchlists.

Thanks, 

QuantJourney

https://reddit.com/link/1iyca21/video/l0wy2cza3ele1/player
